inputs.label: Irrigation Type
inputs.businessContext: Selecting irrigation type affects water usage efficiency and energy requirements. Based on FAO irrigation guidelines.

inputs.label: Irrigated Area (ha)
inputs.businessContext: Total area under irrigation. Standard unit in agriculture (hectares).

inputs.label: Water Source
inputs.businessContext: Water source influences pumping cost and water price. Based on typical agricultural water sources.

inputs.label: Water Volume per Hectare (m³/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Annual water requirement per hectare. Varies by crop and climate. FAO standard range.

inputs.label: Pump Head (m)
inputs.businessContext: Total dynamic head for pumping. Affects energy cost. Typical range for irrigation pumps.

inputs.label: Pump Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the pump. Standard range from pump manufacturers (ISO 9906).

inputs.label: Energy Cost ($/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of electricity. Typical US industrial rate (EIA data).

inputs.label: Water Cost ($/m³)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of water if purchased. For groundwater, may be zero. Based on local water rates.

inputs.label: Labor Cost ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for irrigation labor. Typical agricultural wage.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Hectare (hours/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Annual labor hours per hectare for irrigation management. Varies by system type.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost ($/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Annual maintenance cost per hectare. Includes repairs and parts.

inputs.label: System Life (years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected lifespan of irrigation system. Typical range for drip/sprinkler systems.

inputs.label: Capital Cost ($/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Initial investment cost per hectare. Varies by system type. Based on industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typical agricultural project rate (World Bank).

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Used for adjusted outputs. Standard risk assessment practice.

hiddenLossDrivers: if energyCostPerHectare > 1000 then 'High energy cost per hectare'
if waterCostPerHectare > 500 then 'High water cost per hectare'
if totalAnnualCostPerHectare > 3000 then 'Total cost exceeds critical threshold'
suggestedActions: if energyCostPerHectare > 500 then 'Consider upgrading to high-efficiency pump or solar pumping'
if waterCostPerHectare > 200 then 'Evaluate water conservation techniques (e.g., drip irrigation, scheduling)'
if laborCostPerHectare > 500 then 'Consider automation or labor-saving irrigation systems'
if maintenanceCostPerHectare > 300 then 'Implement preventive maintenance program'
if capitalCostPerHectare > 3000 then 'Explore subsidies or financing options'
